ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Lime, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 45% groene peper*, 10% citroengras*, 10% sjalot*, 10% knoflook*, 10% zout, 6% korianderzaad*, 5% laos*, 2% limoenblad, 1.5% komijnzaad*, 0.5% conserveermiddel (citroenzuur). (*van biologische oorsprong)
